title: At Last
why_this_song: At Last by Etta James (1960) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 3 times; first heard in: "At last, my love has come along"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I found a dream, that I could speak to"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I found a dream, that I could speak to"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I found a thrill to rest my cheek to"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "You smile"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Oh and then the spell was cast
At last, my love has come along
And life is like a song

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "last" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "last" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "yeah" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "yeah" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: At last, my love has come along
At last, the skies above are blue
A thrill that I have never known

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: The night I looked at you

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "At Last" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "At Last" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "At Last", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "At Last", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "At Last" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "At Last" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
